title: Bandits in Rome
writer: Giacinto Ciaccio, Massimo D'Avak, Carlo Romano
actors: John Cassavetes, Gabriele Ferzetti, Anita Sanders
plot: A professional holdup man with scruples has a young ambitious partner who covets his wife and his life. When the holdup man goes to prison, the partner cuts loose, leaving a trail of deaths behind him.
